title: Eid Prayer Announcement
message: Eid is tomorrow! In Brighton UK, Eid prayer will take place in Preston Park BN1 6SD at 9am BST. There will be no prayers in Al Medinah mosque or Al Quds mosques. Please arrive early. The Khutbah will take place after the Salah. 🌳

title: Welcome to Athanly
message: Stay tuned for updates from your community!
